name: Basler Mehlsuppe/ Basler Flour Soup English
recipeIngredient: 3 1/3 oz sprinz (or other Swiss cheese), shredded
recipeInstructions:
Step 1:
- Cut the onion into fine strips.
- Roast the flour in a pan in the oven at high heat until dark brown.
- Cool down the flour.
Step 2:
- Roast the onion and margarine.
- Stir in the flour, mixing well.
- Cool down slightly.
- Stir in the consomme (or bouillon), stirring well.
- Add the red wine and bring to a boil for one hour.
- Carefully purée the soup in a blender at low speed until very smooth.
- Return to the pot and adjust the salt and pepper.
- Serve with shredded sprinz.
